calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Larry R. Shockey, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Daniel Patrick Terry, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Martindale Washington.
Default was entered against defendant on May 17, 2007.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Daniel Patrick Terry, and against the Defaulted Defendant Martindale Washington as follows:

Damages/Principal - $40,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,999.99.
Private Investigator's Fees - $355,09.
Costs - $355.09, for a total judgment in the amount of $49,588.08.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
